title: create_project_with_initial_canvas_settings
description: Test the POST /rest/v1/projects endpoint to create a new project with valid initial canvas settings and verify the response returns a 201 status with the project ID.

title: fetch_project_list_ordered_by_last_update
description: Test the GET /rest/v1/projects endpoint to fetch the list of projects ordered by last update and verify the response returns a 200 status with the correct project records.

title: update_project_metadata_and_sharing_flags
description: Test the PATCH /rest/v1/projects?id=eq.{projectId} endpoint to update project metadata and sharing flags with valid data and verify the response returns a 204 status indicating successful update.

title: delete_existing_project
description: Test the DELETE /rest/v1/projects?id=eq.{projectId} endpoint to delete an existing project and verify the response returns a 204 status indicating successful deletion.

title: save_version_snapshots_for_project
description: Test the POST /rest/v1/project_versions endpoint to save a version snapshot for a project with valid data and verify the response returns a 201 status with the version ID.

title: list_and_fetch_version_records_by_project
description: Test the GET /rest/v1/project_versions endpoint to list and fetch version records filtered by project ID and verify the response returns a 200 status with the correct version list.

title: publish_or_update_project_in_gallery
description: Test the POST /rest/v1/gallery_projects endpoint to publish or update a project in the gallery with valid data and verify the response returns a 200 status with the gallery record.

title: increment_clone_counter_for_gallery_projects
description: Test the POST /rest/v1/rpc/increment_clones_count endpoint to increment the clone counter for a gallery project with valid gallery ID and verify the response returns a 200 status with the updated clone count.

title: fetch_conversations_scoped_by_user_and_project
description: Test the GET /rest/v1/ai_conversations endpoint to fetch AI conversation history scoped by user and project with valid JWT and verify the response returns a 200 status with the conversation history.

title: upsert_api_keys_and_generation_history
description: Test the POST /rest/v1/user_settings endpoint to upsert user settings including API keys and generation history with valid data and verify the response returns a 201 status indicating successful upsert.
